heading: No reduction in amounts
label: 3411 No reduction in amounts
notes: References in TextThe Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act, referred to in subsec. (b), is , , , which is classified principally to chapter 46 (§ 5301 et seq.) of this title. Amendments2017— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “In no case shall the amount of Federal funds available to a tribal government involved in any demonstration project be reduced as a result of the enactment of this chapter.”Pub. L. 115–93
